label: 2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 8

extraction.one_line_summary: VINE Jay attacked decisively on the final Cat 1 climb to solo for his second stage win while EVENEPOEL defended red jersey against POGACAR/MAS/ROGLIC without time gaps.
tactical_patterns: VINE Jay dominated KOM points across multiple climbs before final attack, making polkadot jersey competition mathematically unassailable early-race.
EVENEPOEL burned entire Quick-Step team on final climb to neutralize GC attacks, preserving 28-second lead through pure defensive power.
PEDERSEN Mads infiltrated quality breakaway on mountain stage to capture green jersey via intermediate sprints, unconventional sprinter positioning.
UAE/Jumbo/Ineos failed to coordinate attacks despite EVENEPOEL isolation, allowing him to mark each move individually without time losses.

rider_signals.VINE Jay: positive: second stage win plus KOM domination suggests breakaway threat level underestimated, can both climb and time-trial solo efforts
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: defended 28-second lead while isolated on Cat 1 climb against three GC rivals, stronger uphill than pre-race form suggested
rider_signals.SOLAIRE Marc: positive: second runner-up finish after own stage win, consistently strong in breakaways suggests under-handicapped for long-range moves
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: positive: rejoined elite climbers after struggling for form, worked hard to bridge then held position suggesting resurgent condition
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: positive: unconventional green jersey play infiltrating mountain breakaway reveals tactical flexibility beyond pure sprinting
rider_signals.MAS Enric: neutral: stayed with EVENEPOEL on final climb but failed to distance him despite home advantage terrain
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: neutral: matched EVENEPOEL pace but Jumbo-Visma generated no offensive pressure despite GC deficit
rider_signals.LOPEZ Nicolas: negative: dropped on final climb while other GC contenders stayed together, legs not recovered from early struggles
